$schema.description: JSON Schema reference for IDE support.

vendor.description: Vendor identifier matching VendorType in cli/types.

hookDir.description: Relative path to the vendor's hooks directory (e.g., .claude/hooks).

settingsFile.description: Relative path to the vendor's settings file where hook entries are registered.

projectDirEnv.description: Environment variable for the project root (e.g., CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR). null = use relative paths.

events.description: Map of vendor event names to hook configs. Keys are vendor-specific event names (e.g., PreToolUse, BeforeTool). Value may be a single hook entry or an ordered array of entries (chained).

statusLine.description: Hook script for the status line display (Claude Code only).

extra.description: Additional top-level settings to merge (e.g., permissions).

featureFlags.description: Vendor-specific feature flags to enable (e.g., Codex config.toml).

hook.description: Filename of the hook script in .agents/hooks/core/.

matcher.description: Tool or agent matcher pattern (e.g., Bash, *). Omit if not applicable.

hookRef.description: Reference to a hook script in core/.

hook.description: Filename of the hook script in .agents/hooks/core/.

featureFlags.description: Feature flags to enable in a vendor config file.

file.description: Relative path to the config file (e.g., .codex/config.toml).

flags.description: Key-value pairs of flags to set.
